zh.lifeSummary: 當Gertrud von Haldensleben於大約1025年出生在德國貝也史瓦本時，她的父親Konrad von Haldensleben20歲，母親Gertrude von Friesland16歲。她和Friedrich von Formbach至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1116年2月21日享年92歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Gertrud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

variants.name: Gertraud
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

variants.name: Gertraut
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

en.lifeSummary: When Gertrud von Haldensleben was born about 1025, in Swabia, Bavaria, Germany, her father, Konrad von Haldensleben, was 20 and her mother, Gertrude von Friesland, was 16. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Friedrich von Formbach. She died on 21 February 1116, at the age of 92.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gertrud von Haldensleben est née environ 1025, à Schwaben, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Konrad von Haldensleben, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Gertrude von Friesland, avait 16 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Friedrich von Formbach. Elle est décédée le 21 février 1116, à l’âge de 92 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gertrud von Haldensleben um 1025 in Schwaben, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Konrad von Haldensleben 20 und ihre Mutter Gertrude von Friesland 16. Sie hatte mit Friedrich von Formbach mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. Februar 1116 im Alter von 92 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrud von Haldensleben è nata il circa 1025 nel Schwaben, Bayern, Germania, sua padre, Konrad von Haldensleben, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Gertrude von Friesland, aveva 16 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Friedrich von Formbach. Morì il 21 febbraio 1116, all'età di 92 anni.

ko.Vornbach, Neuhaus am Inn, Landkreis Pass: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 파소 니우하스 아 이 보른바치
ko.lifeSummary: Gertrud von Haldensleben(이)가 대략 1025년 독일 베이른 슈와벤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Konrad von Haldensleben(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gertrude von Friesland(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 Friedrich von Formbach(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1116년 2월 21일 92세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Friedrich von Formbach. Ela faleceu em 21 de fevereiro de 1116, com 92 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gertrud von Haldensleben родилась около 1025 г. в местности щвабен, беиирн, Германия, её отцу по имени Konrad von Haldensleben было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Gertrude von Friesland, 16. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Friedrich von Formbach. Она умерла 21 февраля 1116 г. в возрасте 92 лет.
